query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `google_maps_leads` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `session_id` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `place_id` varchar(128),
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(128),
  `address` text,
  `city` varchar(128),
  `phone` varchar(64),
  `website` text,
  `has_website` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `web_quality_score` int,
  `rating` varchar(8),
  `reviews_count` int,
  `lat` varchar(32),
  `lng` varchar(32),
  `google_maps_url` text,
  `gml_status` enum('new','contacted','interested','converted','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  `converted_to_lead_id` int,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `web_audits` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `url` text NOT NULL,
  `business_name` varchar(256),
  `overall_score` int NOT NULL,
  `performance_score` int,
  `seo_score` int,
  `mobile_score` int,
  `design_score` int,
  `speed_ms` int,
  `issues` json,
  `recommendations` json,
  `tech_stack` json,
  `has_contact_form` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `has_ssl` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `has_mobile_menu` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `has_online_booking` tinyint DEFAULT 0,
  `screenshot_url` text,
  `linked_google_maps_lead_id` int,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL
);
